messages.content: Good day, Anugrah Dubey. I am JARVIS, your AI assistant. How may I assist you today?

I am currently at your service, Anugrah Dubey, ready to provide information, answer questions, or help with tasks as needed. It's a quiet morning, 26 minutes past midnight on this Monday, the 16th of March, 2026.
Your birthday is on the 28th, Anugrah Dubey. I'll make sure to note that for future reference.

A belated happy birthday wish is in order, but since your birthday is on the 28th, I'll save the wish for then. For now, I'll simply say I'm looking forward to wishing you a happy birthday on the 28th, Anugrah Dubey.
You're welcome, Anugrah Dubey. I'll be here when the 28th arrives, ready to extend my best birthday wishes to you.
It was a brief conversation, Anugrah Dubey. I'll be here whenever you need me again. Goodnight, and I'll see you soon.
